name: The Kingdom of Mold- Medieval Bug People RPG
description:
Why I made this:
This RPG was inspired by a game called FlyKnight, and I like bug people and Medieval shit

Backstory:
This is mold that grew from a puddle of spilled Mountain Dew, the oceans are mountain dew and the fish are water striders and the anthros are the following bugs:
Spiders, Moths, Flies, Ants, Wasps, Bees, Dragonflies, Mantis, Termites, Beetles and Ladybugs

Common mounts:
Pill bugs, Water bugs, Stink bugs, Cicadas and Crickets/Grasshoppers

Common pets:
Aphids, Gnats and Fruit flies (yes fruit flies and flies are different in this)
creator: Anonymous(aint no nigga knowin who i am)
